_meta.purpose: Links a paper-triage destination back to the ADHD pattern underneath it and the matching lesson, so each card can deliver understanding + one adjustment. Seeded from the pattern-map canonical model (patterns.json / lessons.json).

admin.note: Admin piles up where knowing what to do never became doing it. Filing it is the bridge.

knowledge-creative.note: Ideas on paper are out where you can see them because out-of-sight is out-of-mind. Capture keeps them without the clutter.

personal.note: The keepsake matters; the paper doesn't. Back up the meaning, free the surface.
